hintDisplay: Sujeto: El campista / Verbo: estar (en pasado continuo) / Complemento: explorar el bosque / Verbo: comenzar (en pasado simple) / Complemento: llover / Tiempo: cuando (marcador de simultaneidad)
spanishSentence: El campista no estaba explorando el bosque cuando comenzó a llover.
correctSentence: The camper was not exploring the forest when it started to rain.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: El fotógrafo / Verbo: Estar (auxiliar de progresivo) / Verbo: Fotografiar / Complemento: Los pájaros / Verbo: Volar / Complemento: Sobre la montaña
spanishSentence: El fotógrafo estaba fotografiando los pájaros mientras volaban sobre la montaña.
correctSentence: The photographer was photographing the birds while they were flying over the mountain.

correctSentence: The gardener was not harvesting the vegetables when the storm arrived.

correctSentence: The hiker was climbing the mountain when it started to rain.

Tiempo: cuando (when - marca el momento en que ocurrió la acción principal)

correctSentence: We were not hiking through the forest when it started to rain.

correctSentence: The gardener was not watering the plants when it started raining.

correctSentence: The ranger was protecting the forest from illegal hunters when he spotted a rare bird.

correctSentence: The hiker was not camping in the forest when the storm arrived.
